<!-- How can a reviewer test the changes locally? -->

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🚀 New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🧹 Refactoring / Technical Debt
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ⚙️ CI/CD or build system change

## Checklist before requesting a review
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code.
- [ ] My commit messages follow the guidelines in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] The code follows the project's style guidelines (run `mvn spotless:apply sortpom:sort`).
- [ ] I have added tests (when applicable) that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally with my changes (run `mvn verify`).
- [ ] (If applicable) Database migrations are added in `src/main/resources/db/migration`.

## Screenshots / Evidence
<!-- Add screenshots or logs to demonstrate the change, if applicable. -->

## Pipeline & Coverage
- [ ] I have checked that the CI pipeline passes.
- [ ] I have verified the test coverage (see `target/site/jacoco/index.html` after running tests).
